result.title: On the Road With DRIVE AV
result.description:
NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang joins NVIDIA Vice President of Automotive Xinzhou Wu for a drive through San Francisco, discussing what it takes to deliver autonomous driving that feels comfortable, confident, and safe. 

Register for NVIDIA GTC 2026 🗓️
Add Xinzhou Wu’s Automotive Special Address to your schedule: "Advancing Level 4 Autonomy: The Path to Scalable, Safe AVs and Robotaxis"
➡️ https://www.nvidia.com/gtc/session-catalog/?search=S81713&ncid=so-yout-441723-vt03

More on autonomous driving:

- Read: NVIDIA DRIVE AV defined Mercedes-Benz CLA ➡️ https://blogs.nvidia.com/blog/mercedes-benz-l4-s-class-drive-av-platform?ncid=so-yout-970401-vt03 
- Watch: NVIDIA DRIVE AV navigate complex urban environments with Sarah Tariq ▶️ https://youtu.be/XH9N1SIJ7Dg

result.title: Disney Characters Coming to Life at NVIDIA GTC 2026
result.description:
Ever wondered how Disney's characters make it from the screen to reality? 🎬

Behind the magic is physical AI:
- Newton & Kamino: Leveraging the open-source, GPU-accelerated Newton framework and Disney’s Kamino solver for artist-centric reinforcement learning. 
- Expressive Motion: Training motion diffusion models and policies to push robotic characters to perform at the limits of hardware.
- Believable Autonomy: Utilizing onboard perception for autonomous navigation and unique, engaging guest interactions with authentic character motion.

Come join Moritz Baecher at #NVIDIAGTC to see how physical AI enables Disney to bring characters to life in the real world within months.

 Tues, Mar 17 | 9:00 AM PT
Add to schedule 🔗 https://nvda.ws/4rOy82t
